subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में पहले रक्षा को विभिन्न क्या है।
explanation_en:
The Amer Fort is a famous fort located in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
English: Amer Fort is the famous fort located in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: जयपुर, राजस्थान में अमेर फोट एक फोट है।
